utterance: configuring clippy and cargo-deny for my Rust project

assertions.text: the agent should read skills/rust/SKILL.md before configuring; the skill encodes clippy/cargo-deny/cargo-vet setup patterns
the response should produce a clippy.toml (or [lints] table in Cargo.toml) with at least the workspace-level lints (clippy::all, clippy::pedantic, clippy::nursery)
the response should produce a deny.toml configuration with licenses, bans, advisories, and sources sections per the rust skill's recommended template
the response should mention CI integration (GitHub Actions or similar) running cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings and cargo deny check
the response should pin specific versions (clippy = Rust 1.74+ stable; cargo-deny = 0.14+) and note MSRV implications, not just 'install latest'

reference_solution: Agent reads rust/SKILL.md, produces Cargo.toml [lints] section + deny.toml + .github/workflows/ci.yml running clippy + cargo-deny, pins versions, notes MSRV.
